summary.intent: Resume a previous development session that involved UI improvements to React components in the Gossamer app.
summary.outcome: Session context was restored by reviewing uncommitted changes; three component files with completed UI improvements were identified and summarized, but no new work was initiated.

repo: EventItem uses a splitHeader pattern to show one-line headers with expandable bodies for user/assistant cards
MarkdownView exports an InlineMarkdown component used by EventItem
ToolGroupItem styling convention: left border + background (not bottom border) for visual grouping

code.finding: Added splitHeader function to render collapsible user/assistant cards with a one-line header preview using InlineMarkdown
InlineMarkdown added as a named export, intended for compact single-line markdown rendering
Styling changed from bottom border to left border + background for tool group items

workflow: Resuming sessions by reading modified files + running git diff is an effective way to reconstruct prior context
Grouping related UI changes across multiple components in a single uncommitted changeset before committing is the working pattern here

friction: No explicit task or next step was defined at session end, requiring context reconstruction on resume
open_items: Changes in EventItem.tsx, MarkdownView.tsx, and ToolGroupItem.tsx are uncommitted and need to be committed
No next task was identified — follow-up work direction is undefined
